title: GitHub - NanoNets/ami: Ami - your AI clone. A local agent harness that connects to your tools, learns your world, and does your busy work.
excerpt: Ami - your AI clone. A local agent harness that connects to your tools, learns your world, and does your busy work. - NanoNets/ami
content_html:
ami-product-video.mp4

Ami is a local agent harness that acts as your clone, not a separate co-worker. It connects to apps, data, repositories, tools with your personal tokens, maintains a live to-do list, learns how you do tasks, and executes the "busy work" tasks on your behalf. It contructs a context graph memory of you and updates entities, relationships, feedback, decisions, writing style, to get more autonomous the more you use it.

Ami runs on your machine. Data lives under ~/.ami/ (SQLite + markdown memory). Nothing is shared with your org. Ami has exactly the access you have, i.e., it can only reach what you can reach. And nothing ships or gets sent without your click.

Quick start

The only prerequisite is Node ≥ 20.

git clone https://github.com/NanoNets/ami.git && cd ami
./ami

./ami bootstraps everything on first run.

  • It installs dependencies (pnpm via corepack)
  • builds the console and starts the server

Open http://localhost:4141 and walk through onboarding. Configure your model and connect tools using personal tokens. Both are stored only on this machine.

Ami speaks the Anthropic Messages API as a protocol. Switching provider is a single change in Settings → Models:

  • API key — your provider's key (Anthropic's by default).
  • Base URL — leave blank for Anthropic, or point it at any Anthropic-compatible endpoint.
  • Model for triage & task runs — the main model (default claude-opus-4-8). Free-text: any model name your endpoint serves.
  • Model for memory agents — the cheap/utility model (default claude-sonnet-4-6). It runs on every substantive signal, so on a local setup this is the knob to point at a small model.

The Claude Agent SDK honors the base URL, and its internal small-model calls are remapped to your utility model. Structured outputs automatically fall back to schema-prompted JSON on non-Anthropic endpoints, so compat providers work without tweaks.

Hosted open models - Kimi, GLM, DeepSeek, and MiniMax all publish Anthropic-compatible base URLs (e.g. https://api.moonshot.ai/anthropic for Kimi). Set the base URL, their key, and their model names.

Fully local — put a LiteLLM proxy in front of Ollama / vLLM / llama.cpp; it exposes the Anthropic protocol:

ollama pull qwen3:32b
pip install 'litellm[proxy]'
litellm --model ollama/qwen3:32b     # Anthropic-compatible endpoint on :4000

Then in Settings → Models: base URL http://localhost:4000, model ollama/qwen3:32b for both knobs (or a smaller model for memory agents), and any placeholder key if the proxy has no auth. With connectors polling local-first, nothing leaves your machine at all.

./ami update       # pull the latest, reinstall, rebuild
./ami build        # force-rebuild the console

Optional extras, install if you want the matching feature:

  • gh CLI — coding tasks need it to open PRs (brew install gh)
  • ffmpeg + whisper-cpp — a local meeting recorder with on-device transcription (brew install ffmpeg whisper-cpp)

The console

Page What it does
Home A homescreen with to-dos and meetings
To-do A universal list of to-dos from every connected tool
Chat A copilot chat with the same tool surface as to-do runs. You can ask questions, fire off work, create to-dos, update memory
Agents A page to create agents that run on a schedule
History An archive of past to-dos
Memory A visualization of the current memory as a context graph
Settings Connectors, models, knobs, usage data

Global search and notifications live in the header navbar.

How it works

  1. Ingest — a poller pulls new mentions, DMs, emails, invites, notifications through each connector using your personal tokens / API keys.
  2. Triage — a Claude call classifies each signal as task / FYI / ignore with a due date. Entities and relationships flow into the knowledge base. Your feedback (corrections, dismissals, overrides) become decision traces in the knowledge base that steer future triage.
  3. Act — each to-do item has five actions:
    • Plan — explores read-only and proposes an editable plan.
    • Start — runs the task in an isolated Claude Agent SDK session.
    • Resolve — indicates you did it yourself and updates knowledge base
    • Dismiss / Snooze — dismissals discourages future triage of similar tasks, snoozed tasks return tomorrow.
  4. Review — deliverables (PR link, doc, event, meeting link) land on the task page along with a drafted reply. Ami never sends anything itself. You edit/approve, then it posts to the originating Slack thread / email thread from your account. Your edits are diffed into memory and refine Ami's execution and voice.
  5. Iterate — feedback on a finished task resumes the same agent session with full context.

Every to-do run and every copilot chat grows the knowledge base.

The context graph memory

Memory is an Obsidian-style markdown knowledge base at ~/.ami/knowledge/ — dossiers with wiki-links, curated by note agents after each batch of activity, versioned with git so every note has history and restore. It powers:

  • Meeting prep — attendees resolved against the knowledge base; a brief (who's coming, what matters, open items) lands before each meeting.
  • Meeting recorder — record mic + system audio locally, transcribe on-device with whisper.cpp, feed the transcript into memory. No audio leaves the machine.
  • Style — Ami learns how you write from your real messages and your edits to its drafts; replies come out in your voice.
  • Decision traces — past exceptions, overrides, and feedback are retrieved when similar situations recur, so Ami decides the way you already decided.

Connectors

Ami currently has a limited number of connectors. But it is skilled to build any tool connector for you.

  • Go to Settings
  • Click on "Add a connector" at the bottom of the connector list.
  • Specify the name, homepage url, and your intent on using the connector

Ami will build the connector (using your claude code and your API key) and make it available to task runs and copilot chats.

Data & privacy

Everything Ami knows lives under ~/.ami/.

  • ami.db (SQLite — signals, todos, runs, settings, tokens)
  • knowledge/ (the markdown knowledge base, git-versioned)
  • worktrees/ (isolated coding checkouts),
  • bg-tasks/ and events/ (background agent state).

Delete the directory and Ami forgets everything. The only outbound calls are to the Anthropic API and to the tools you connected with your tokens.

WIP

Ami is built as an internal tool. It's still in development stage, and we'll push a stable release soon. Stay tuned.

License

MIT

sentences.zh: Ami 是一个本地代理工具，充当您的克隆人，而不是一个单独的同事。

sentences.en: It connects to apps, data, repositories, tools with your personal tokens, maintains a live to-do list, learns how you do tasks, and executes the "busy work" tasks on your behalf.

sentences.en: It contructs a context graph memory of you and updates entities, relationships, feedback, decisions, writing style, to get more autonomous the more you use it.
sentences.zh: 它构建了你的上下文图记忆，并更新实体、关系、反馈、决策、写作风格，让你使用得越多，就越能自主。

sentences.en: Start — runs the task in an isolated Claude Agent SDK session.
sentences.zh: 开始 — 在隔离的 Claude Agent SDK 会话中运行任务。

blocks.html_en: • Resolve — indicates you did it yourself and updates knowledge base

sentences.en: Resolve — indicates you did it yourself and updates knowledge base
sentences.zh: 解决 - 表示您自己完成并更新知识库

blocks.html_en: • Dismiss / Snooze — dismissals discourages future triage of similar tasks, snoozed tasks return tomorrow.

sentences.en: Dismiss / Snooze — dismissals discourages future triage of similar tasks, snoozed tasks return tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 解雇/暂停 - 解雇会阻止未来对类似任务进行分类，暂停的任务明天会返回。

blocks.html_en: • Review — deliverables (PR link, doc, event, meeting link) land on the task page along with a drafted reply. Ami never sends anything itself. You edit/approve, then it posts to the originating Slack thread / email thread from your account. Your edits are diffed into memory and refine Ami's execution and voice.

sentences.en: Review — deliverables (PR link, doc, event, meeting link) land on the task page along with a drafted reply.
sentences.zh: 审核 — 可交付成果（公关链接、文档、活动、会议链接）连同起草的回复一起出现在任务页面上。

sentences.en: Ami never sends anything itself.
sentences.zh: 阿米本身从不发送任何东西。

sentences.en: You edit/approve, then it posts to the originating Slack thread / email thread from your account.
sentences.zh: 您编辑/批准，然后它会从您的帐户发布到原始 Slack 线程/电子邮件线程。

sentences.en: Your edits are diffed into memory and refine Ami's execution and voice.
sentences.zh: 您的编辑会融入记忆并完善 Ami 的执行力和声音。

blocks.html_en: • Iterate — feedback on a finished task resumes the same agent session with full context.

sentences.en: Iterate — feedback on a finished task resumes the same agent session with full context.
sentences.zh: 迭代 - 对已完成任务的反馈会恢复具有完整上下文的相同代理会话。

blocks.html_en: Every to-do run and every copilot chat grows the knowledge base.

sentences.en: Every to-do run and every copilot chat grows the knowledge base.
sentences.zh: 每一次待办事项运行和每次副驾驶聊天都会增加知识库。

blocks.html_en: The context graph memory

sentences.en: The context graph memory
sentences.zh: 上下文图内存

blocks.html_en: Memory is an Obsidian-style markdown knowledge base at ~/.ami/knowledge/ — dossiers with wiki-links, curated by note agents after each batch of activity, versioned with git so every note has history and restore. It powers:

sentences.en: Memory is an Obsidian-style markdown knowledge base at ~/.ami/knowledge/ — dossiers with wiki-links, curated by note agents after each batch of activity, versioned with git so every note has history and restore.
sentences.zh: Memory 是一个黑曜石风格的 Markdown 知识库，位于 ~/.ami/knowledge/ — 带有 wiki 链接的档案，由笔记代理在每批活动后整理，使用 git 进行版本控制，因此每个笔记都有历史记录和恢复。

sentences.en: It powers:
sentences.zh: 它的力量：

blocks.html_en: • Meeting prep — attendees resolved against the knowledge base; a brief (who's coming, what matters, open items) lands before each meeting.

sentences.en: Meeting prep — attendees resolved against the knowledge base; a brief (who's coming, what matters, open items) lands before each meeting.
sentences.zh: 会议准备——与会者根据知识库做出决定；每次会议之前都会有一份简报（谁来、重要的事情、未解决的项目）。

blocks.html_en: • Meeting recorder — record mic + system audio locally, transcribe on-device with whisper.cpp, feed the transcript into memory. No audio leaves the machine.

sentences.en: Meeting recorder — record mic + system audio locally, transcribe on-device with whisper.cpp, feed the transcript into memory.
sentences.zh: 会议录音机 — 在本地录制麦克风 + 系统音频，使用 Whisper.cpp 在设备上转录，将转录内容输入内存。

sentences.en: No audio leaves the machine.
sentences.zh: 机器没有声音。

blocks.html_en: • Style — Ami learns how you write from your real messages and your edits to its drafts; replies come out in your voice.

sentences.en: Style — Ami learns how you write from your real messages and your edits to its drafts; replies come out in your voice.
sentences.zh: 风格 — Ami 从您的真实信息和您对草稿的编辑中了解您的写作方式；答案从你的声音中出来。

blocks.html_en: • Decision traces — past exceptions, overrides, and feedback are retrieved when similar situations recur, so Ami decides the way you already decided.

sentences.en: Decision traces — past exceptions, overrides, and feedback are retrieved when similar situations recur, so Ami decides the way you already decided.
sentences.zh: 决策跟踪——当类似情况再次发生时，会检索过去的异常、覆盖和反馈，因此 Ami 会按照您已经决定的方式做出决定。

blocks.html_en: Connectors

sentences.en: Connectors
sentences.zh: 连接器

blocks.html_en: Ami currently has a limited number of connectors. But it is skilled to build any tool connector for you.

sentences.en: Ami currently has a limited number of connectors.
sentences.zh: Ami 目前的连接器数量有限。

sentences.en: But it is skilled to build any tool connector for you.
sentences.zh: 但为您构建任何工具连接器都是熟练的。

blocks.html_en: • Go to Settings

sentences.en: Go to Settings
sentences.zh: 前往“设置”

blocks.html_en: • Click on "Add a connector" at the bottom of the connector list.

sentences.en: Click on "Add a connector" at the bottom of the connector list.
sentences.zh: 单击连接器列表底部的“添加连接器”。

blocks.html_en: • Specify the name, homepage url, and your intent on using the connector

sentences.en: Specify the name, homepage url, and your intent on using the connector
sentences.zh: 指定名称、主页 URL 以及您使用连接器的意图

blocks.html_en: Ami will build the connector (using your claude code and your API key) and make it available to task runs and copilot chats.

sentences.en: Ami will build the connector (using your claude code and your API key) and make it available to task runs and copilot chats.
sentences.zh: Ami 将构建连接器（使用您的 claude 代码和 API 密钥）并使其可用于任务运行和副驾驶聊天。

blocks.html_en: Data & privacy

sentences.en: Data & privacy
sentences.zh: 数据和隐私

blocks.html_en: Everything Ami knows lives under ~/.ami/.

sentences.en: Everything Ami knows lives under ~/.ami/.
sentences.zh: Ami 知道的所有内容都位于 ~/.ami/ 下。

blocks.html_en: • ami.db (SQLite — signals, todos, runs, settings, tokens)

sentences.en: ami.db (SQLite — signals, todos, runs, settings, tokens)
sentences.zh: ami.db（SQLite — 信号、待办事项、运行、设置、标记）

blocks.html_en: • knowledge/ (the markdown knowledge base, git-versioned)

sentences.en: knowledge/ (the markdown knowledge base, git-versioned)
sentences.zh: Knowledge/（Markdown 知识库，git 版本）

blocks.html_en: • worktrees/ (isolated coding checkouts),

sentences.en: worktrees/ (isolated coding checkouts),
sentences.zh: worktrees/（隔离编码检查），

blocks.html_en: • bg-tasks/ and events/ (background agent state).

sentences.en: bg-tasks/ and events/ (background agent state).
sentences.zh: bg-tasks/ 和 events/（后台代理状态）。

blocks.html_en: Delete the directory and Ami forgets everything. The only outbound calls are to the Anthropic API and to the tools you connected with your tokens.

sentences.en: Delete the directory and Ami forgets everything.
sentences.zh: 删除目录后，阿米就忘记了一切。

sentences.en: The only outbound calls are to the Anthropic API and to the tools you connected with your tokens.
sentences.zh: 唯一的出站调用是对 Anthropic API 和您使用令牌连接的工具的调用。

blocks.html_en: WIP
Ami is built as an internal tool. It's still in development stage, and we'll push a stable release soon. Stay tuned.

sentences.en: Ami is built as an internal tool.
sentences.zh: Ami 是作为内部工具构建的。

sentences.en: It's still in development stage, and we'll push a stable release soon.
sentences.zh: 它仍处于开发阶段，我们将很快推出稳定版本。

sentences.en: Stay tuned.
sentences.zh: 敬请关注。

blocks.html_en: License

sentences.en: License
sentences.zh: 执照

blocks.html_en: MIT

content_html_zh:
ami-product-video.mp4

Ami 是一个本地代理工具，充当您的克隆人，而不是一个单独的同事。 它使用您的个人令牌连接到应用程序、数据、存储库、工具，维护实时待办事项列表，了解您如何执行任务，并代表您执行“繁忙的工作”任务。 它构建了你的上下文图记忆，并更新实体、关系、反馈、决策、写作风格，让你使用得越多，就越能自主。

Ami 在您的机器上运行。 数据位于 ~/.ami/（SQLite + Markdown 内存）下。 不会与您的组织共享任何内容。 Ami 完全拥有您所拥有的访问权限，即它只能到达您可以到达的地方。 如果没有您的点击，任何东西都不会被运送或发送。

快速启动

唯一的前提条件是 Node ≥ 20。

git clone https://github.com/NanoNets/ami.git && cd ami
./ami

./ami 在第一次运行时引导所有内容。

  • 它安装依赖项（通过 corepack 进行 pnpm）
  • 构建控制台并启动服务器

打开 http://localhost:4141 并逐步完成入门。 使用个人令牌配置您的模型并连接工具。 两者仅存储在本机上。

Ami 将 Anthropic Messages API 作为一种协议来使用。 切换提供商只需在“设置”→“型号”中进行一次更改即可：

  • API 密钥 — 您的提供商的密钥（默认情况下为 Anthropic）。
  • 基本 URL — 将 Anthropic 留空，或将其指向任何与 Anthropic 兼容的端点。
  • 用于分类和任务运行的模型 - 主要模型（默认 claude-opus-4-8）。 自由文本：您的端点服务的任何型号名称。
  • 内存代理模型 - 廉价/实用模型（默认 claude-sonnet-4-6）。 它在每个实质性信号上运行，因此在本地设置中，这是指向小模型的旋钮。

Claude Agent SDK 遵循基本 URL，其内部小模型调用将重新映射到您的实用程序模型。 结构化输出会在非 Anthropic 端点​​上自动回退到模式提示的 JSON，因此兼容提供程序无需调整即可工作。

托管开放模型 - Kimi、GLM、DeepSeek 和 MiniMax 都发布与 Anthropic 兼容的基本 URL（例如 Kimi 的 https://api.moonshot.ai/anthropic）。 设置基本 URL、密钥及其模型名称。

完全本地化——在 Ollama / vLLM / llama.cpp 前面放置一个 LiteLLM 代理；它公开了 Anthropic 协议：

ollama pull qwen3:32b
pip install 'litellm[proxy]'
litellm --model ollama/qwen3:32b     # Anthropic-compatible endpoint on :4000

然后在“设置”→“模型”中：基本 URL http://localhost:4000、两个旋钮的模型 ollama/qwen3:32b（或内存代理的较小模型）以及任何占位符密钥（如果代理没有身份验证）。 通过连接器优先轮询本地，任何东西都不会离开您的机器。

./ami update       # pull the latest, reinstall, rebuild
./ami build        # force-rebuild the console

可选附加功能，如果您需要匹配的功能，请安装：

  • gh CLI — 编码任务需要它来打开 PR（brew install gh）
  • ffmpeg + 耳语-cpp — 具有设备上转录功能的本地会议记录器（brew install ffmpeg 耳语-cpp）

控制台

Page 它的作用
Home 包含待办事项和会议的主屏幕
To-do 每个连接工具的通用待办事项列表
Chat 使用与待办事项运行相同的工具界面进行副驾驶聊天。 您可以提出问题、结束工作、创建待办事项、更新记忆
代理商 用于创建按计划运行的代理的页面
历史 过去待办事项的存档
记忆 将当前内存可视化为上下文图
设置 连接器、型号、旋钮、使用数据

全局搜索和通知位于标题导航栏中。

它是如何运作的

  1. 摄取——轮询器使用您的个人令牌/API 密钥通过每个连接器提取新的提及、私信、电子邮件、邀请、通知。
  2. 分类 — Claude 调用将每个信号分类为任务/仅供参考/忽略，并指定截止日期。 实体和关系流入知识库。 您的反馈（更正、驳回、覆盖）将成为知识库中的决策痕迹，指导未来的分类。
  3. 行动 - 每个待办事项有五个行动： 计划 - 探索只读并提出可编辑的计划。 开始 — 在隔离的 Claude Agent SDK 会话中运行任务。 解决 - 表示您自己完成并更新知识库 解雇/暂停 - 解雇不鼓励未来对类似任务进行分类，暂停的任务明天返回。
  4. 审核 — 可交付成果（公关链接、文档、活动、会议链接）连同起草的回复一起出现在任务页面上。 阿米本身从不发送任何东西。 您编辑/批准，然后它会从您的帐户发布到原始 Slack 线程/电子邮件线程。 您的编辑会融入记忆并完善 Ami 的执行力和声音。
  5. 迭代 - 对已完成任务的反馈会恢复具有完整上下文的相同代理会话。

每一次待办事项运行和每次副驾驶聊天都会增加知识库。

上下文图内存

Memory 是一个黑曜石风格的 Markdown 知识库，位于 ~/.ami/knowledge/ — 带有 wiki 链接的档案，由笔记代理在每批活动后整理，使用 git 进行版本控制，因此每个笔记都有历史记录和恢复。 它的力量：

  • 会议准备——与会者根据知识库做出决定；每次会议之前都会有一份简报（谁来、重要的事情、未解决的项目）。
  • 会议录音机 — 在本地录制麦克风 + 系统音频，使用 Whisper.cpp 在设备上转录，将转录内容输入内存。 机器没有声音。
  • 风格 — Ami 从您的真实信息和您对草稿的编辑中了解您的写作方式；答案从你的声音中出来。
  • 决策跟踪——当类似情况再次发生时，会检索过去的异常、覆盖和反馈，因此 Ami 会按照您已经决定的方式做出决定。

连接器

Ami 目前的连接器数量有限。 但为您构建任何工具连接器都是熟练的。

  • 前往“设置”
  • 单击连接器列表底部的“添加连接器”。
  • 指定名称、主页 URL 以及您使用连接器的意图

Ami 将构建连接器（使用您的 claude 代码和 API 密钥）并使其可用于任务运行和副驾驶聊天。

数据和隐私

Ami 知道的所有内容都位于 ~/.ami/ 下。

  • ami.db（SQLite — 信号、待办事项、运行、设置、标记）
  • Knowledge/（Markdown 知识库，git 版本）
  • worktrees/（隔离编码检查），
  • bg-tasks/ 和 events/（后台代理状态）。

删除目录后，阿米就忘记了一切。 唯一的出站调用是对 Anthropic API 和您使用令牌连接的工具的调用。

WIP

Ami 是作为内部工具构建的。 它仍处于开发阶段，我们将很快推出稳定版本。 敬请关注。

执照

MIT
